headline: OpenAI Launches Deployment Company Backed by $4B+ from 19 PE Investors, Acquires Tomoro
raw_snippet: OpenAI launched the OpenAI Deployment Company, a new entity to embed frontier-AI engineers into enterprise customers. Valued at $10B, the venture is backed by $4B+ from 19 investors led by TPG, with Advent, Bain Capital, and Brookfield as co-leads. OpenAI simultaneously agreed to acquire London-based AI consulting firm Tomoro and its 150 engineers.

headline: OpenAI Launches Daybreak Cybersecurity Initiative Using GPT-5.5 and Codex Security
raw_snippet: OpenAI announced Daybreak, a cybersecurity initiative combining GPT-5.5, Trusted Access for Cyber, and Codex Security to help organizations identify and patch vulnerabilities. Partners include Akamai, Cisco, Cloudflare, CrowdStrike, Fortinet, Oracle, Palo Alto Networks, and Zscaler. Built on three model tiers: standard GPT-5.5, GPT-5.5 with Trusted Access, and GPT-5.5-Cyber for red teaming.

headline: OpenAI Grants EU Access to GPT-5.5-Cyber Under New EU Cyber Action Plan
raw_snippet: OpenAI announced the EU Cyber Action Plan, granting vetted European cybersecurity teams access to GPT-5.5-Cyber, a defensive variant tuned for penetration testing, vulnerability research, and malware analysis. The plan is structured around four pillars: democratized access, partnership with EU agencies, regulatory alignment, and shared infrastructure with vetted vendors.

headline: OpenAI Publishes ChatGPT Q1 2026 Signals Report Showing Broadening Adoption
raw_snippet: OpenAI's Q1 2026 Signals report shows ChatGPT adoption broadening across demographics: fastest growth among users over 35, users with typically feminine names now account for over half of usage. Geographic expansion accelerated in Latin America, Asia-Pacific, and Africa. Specialized workplace tasks grew fastest relative to general content creation.

headline: DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 Model Snapshots Deprecated and Removed from OpenAI API
raw_snippet: OpenAI removed DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 model snapshots from the API on May 12, 2026, completing a deprecation cycle announced in November 2025. Requests to /v1/images/generations with either model string will no longer work. OpenAI recommends gpt-image-2, gpt-image-1, or gpt-image-1-mini as replacements.

headline: OpenAI Publishes Parameter Golf Results: 1,000+ Participants in ML Challenge
raw_snippet: OpenAI published results from its Parameter Golf challenge, which received 2,000+ submissions from 1,000+ participants. The challenge required minimizing held-out loss on FineWeb data within a 16MB artifact limit and 10-minute training budget on 8×H100s. A major finding: the vast majority of submitters used coding agents as part of their work.

headline: OpenAI Discloses TanStack npm Supply Chain Breach: Two Employee Devices Compromised
raw_snippet: OpenAI confirmed attackers behind the TanStack npm supply chain compromise (dubbed 'Mini Shai-Hulud') stole internal credentials after reaching two employee devices, forcing rotation of signing certificates for desktop products. No user data or production systems were compromised. All macOS users must update apps by June 12, 2026 or lose functionality.

headline: OpenAI Publishes Technical Details on Building Codex Windows Sandbox
raw_snippet: OpenAI detailed the architecture for running Codex safely on Windows, using dedicated lower-privilege sandbox users, filesystem permission boundaries, and firewall rules. The system uses two accounts—CodexSandboxOffline (default) and CodexSandboxOnline (for approved connectivity)—with write access limited to the active workspace and outbound network blocked by default.

headline: OpenAI Improves ChatGPT Safety for Sensitive Conversations with 50% Better Response Rates
raw_snippet: OpenAI announced safety updates that help ChatGPT recognize emerging risk across conversations using 'safety summaries'—short factual notes about earlier safety-relevant context. Updates improved safe-response rates by 50% in suicide/self-harm and 16% in harm-to-others scenarios. On GPT-5.5 Instant, improvements reached 52% for harm-to-others and 39% for self-harm cases.

headline: OpenAI Brings Codex to ChatGPT Mobile App for iOS and Android
raw_snippet: OpenAI added Codex to the ChatGPT mobile app, letting developers monitor coding sessions, review outputs, approve commands, and follow diffs and test results from their phones. Available on iOS and Android for all ChatGPT plans. Over 4 million people now use Codex weekly. At launch, mobile connects only to the macOS Codex desktop app; Windows support is coming.

headline: OpenAI Launches Personal Finance Experience in ChatGPT with Plaid Integration
raw_snippet: OpenAI launched a personal finance experience for ChatGPT Pro subscribers in the US, powered by Plaid. Users can connect accounts from 12,000+ financial institutions including Chase, Fidelity, Schwab, and Robinhood. ChatGPT can read balances, transactions, and investments but cannot view full account numbers or move money. Intuit integration planned for tax estimates and live expert sessions.

headline: OpenAI Considering Legal Action Against Apple Over Siri Partnership Revenue Dispute
raw_snippet: OpenAI is exploring legal action against Apple over a ChatGPT/Siri integration that failed to deliver expected subscribers and revenue. OpenAI initially projected the deal could generate billions annually but 'hasn't come close.' OpenAI has enlisted an outside law firm; any legal move would likely wait until after the Musk trial. Apple has its own concerns about OpenAI's privacy standards and hardware push.
